name: MikroTik CCR2004-16G-2S+
title: MikroTik CCR2004-16G-2S+ RackMount Router – 16x Gigabit, 2x SFP+
title_extended: MikroTik CCR2004-16G-2S+ RackMount Router – 16x Gigabit, 2x SFP+
short_description: CCR2004 series, 16xGigabit Ethernet ports, 2x10G SFP+, 4GB of DDR4 RAM, 128MB of NAND storage
description: Consolidating Networks with CCR. MikroTik's Cloud Core Router series, introduced in early 2023, represents a cutting-edge lineup of high-capacity routers designed to connect and consolidate small computer networks into a single large network. These routers offer powerful single-core performance, making them ideal for handling heavy operations with per-connection processing. The series features a range of models with various port configurations and redundant power supplies, catering to diverse networking needs for businesses, ISPs, research facilities, and more. With their advanced features and affordability, MikroTik's Cloud Core Routers are a reliable choice for taking networking setups to the next level.

detailed_description.heading: Consolidating Networks with CCR
detailed_description.text: MikroTik's Cloud Core Router series, introduced in early 2023, represents a cutting-edge lineup of high-capacity routers designed to connect and consolidate small computer networks into a single large network. These routers offer powerful single-core performance, making them ideal for handling heavy operations with per-connection processing. The series features a range of models with various port configurations and redundant power supplies, catering to diverse networking needs for businesses, ISPs, research facilities, and more. With their advanced features and affordability, MikroTik's Cloud Core Routers are a reliable choice for taking networking setups to the next level.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Networking Performance
detailed_description.text: Upgrade your network capabilities with the MikroTik CCR2004-16G-2S+ router, a powerful and affordable solution that redefines single-core performance. Featuring the AL32400 4-Core 1.7GHz Chipset, this router surpasses all previous CCR models, making it an ideal choice for heavy operations that rely on per-connection processing, such as managing queues with ease.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Connectivity & Versatile Ports
detailed_description.text: The CCR2004-16G-2S+ boasts a total of 18 wired ports, including 16x Gigabit Ethernet ports and two 10G SFP+ cages. With such an extensive range of ports, you can effortlessly handle data-intensive tasks and achieve lightning-fast data transfers over wired connections. Whether you are expanding your office setup or managing a large network, the router's scalable design ensures you can meet your growing demands with ease.

detailed_description.heading: Reliability in a Compact Package
detailed_description.text: Housed in a classic white 1U rackmount case, the CCR2004-16G-2S+ not only delivers exceptional performance but also ensures seamless integration into your network setup. Equipped with 4GB of DDR4 RAM and 128MB of storage memory, the router efficiently handles advanced configurations and updates, ensuring smooth and stable operation at all times.

detailed_description.heading: Efficient Cooling & Redundant Power
detailed_description.text: With active cooling in place, the CCR2004-16G-2S+ effectively maintains optimal temperatures during operation, ensuring consistent and reliable performance even under heavy workloads. Moreover, the built-in dual redundant power supplies offer an added layer of security, ensuring uninterrupted network connectivity.

detailed_description.heading: Future-Proof Connectivity
detailed_description.text: Embrace next-level connectivity with the two 10G SFP+ cages, offering blazing-fast data transmission rates. These high-speed ports not only guarantee seamless connections but also prepare your network for future technological advancements, making the CCR2004-16G-2S+ a smart investment for years to come.

comments.name: Budiyanto
comments.text: Great product from Mikrotik, and Service from Getic is on point, Fast order processing and shipping!

comments.name: Thomas
comments.text: Great, reliable product even with many clients,VLANs and complex firewall config.

comments.name: Rok
comments.text: Excellent device, fast cpu, enough RAM, the only downside is lack of internal space (only 128MB NAND) or maybe an internal port for NVME
